mapper.insert: INSERT INTO evaluate_task (request_id, user_id, status, submitted_at) VALUES (#{requestId}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{submittedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT request_id AS requestId, user_id AS userId, status, error, result_json AS resultJson, submitted_at AS submittedAt, completed_at AS completedAt FROM evaluate_task WHERE request_id = #{requestId}
